Monthly Art on Base - Discover our stunning editions published monthly to bring awareness to the global community. With crosschain accessibility and credit card support, we make it easy for anyone to begin their own global art collecting journey.

Created with love by [Kusari](https://kusari.org).

minting_now.name: SKUULZ
minting_now.description:
8888 SKUULZ is a pixel art collection on the Ethereum blockchain, built for people who care about identity, culture, and strong communities.

Every SKUUL has its own mix of traits, so each one feels different and carries its own vibe, while still staying true to that raw pixel style. The inspiration

minting_now.name: THE SOFT CONSPIRACY
minting_now.description:
They walk among you. They always have.

The cartographer whose face is half-hidden by copper lattice, charting routes between dimensions no atlas would dare publish. The archivist who sits in dark water beneath a crescent moon, cataloging what the living have forgotten. The broker who holds a coin m

minting_now.name: Twilight Cyclist
minting_now.description: Clean, memorable, and slightly mysterious—perfect for a modern NFT collection.

minting_now.name: Homage By NEWRAFAEL
minting_now.description: Homage is a collection of 110 on-chain animations 🌹 project by Rafaël Rozendaal 2022 🌹 svg code by Reinier Feijen 🌹 smart contract by Alberto Granzotto 🌹 based on the work of Josef Albers 🌹 License: CC BY-NC-ND 4.0

minting_now.name: Fuggliez
minting_now.description:
Deep beneath Ape City, the Based Ape Gang discovered some strange, feral creatures moving through the sewers.  It appeared they were feeding on discarded tech, failed experiments, and forgotten code. These creatures became known as Fuggliez.

What started as a curiosity quickly turned into obsession

minting_now.name: Lil Dickbutts
minting_now.description:
Made for degens.
Keep away from children.

minting_now.name: The DAO key
minting_now.description: The Cipher Syndicate key is a virtual world asset for a verified access point into a hidden decentralized world. it is a credential not just an Nft

minting_now.description:
🔥 Warriors Cute 🔥
Where cuteness meets chaos.

A collection of fearless little warriors living in a vibrant fantasy world — cute on the outside, unstoppable on the inside. Each NFT is uniquely crafted with rare traits, epic gear, and powerful personalities.

Apes, We’ve hit the 1M follower milestone!Join our Twitter Space tomorrow at 9pm ET to celebrate all that has been BAYC over the past year and a half with our co-hosts . Come hang in this celebratory community chat.
